issues.description: certificate.filename can be None (per FastAPI UploadFile type), causing Path() to raise TypeError at runtime. This is a type contract violation that will crash on file uploads without a filename.
issues.suggestion: Add None check before creating Path: 'if not certificate.filename: raise HTTPException(400, "Filename is required")' or handle gracefully with a default.

summary: Implementation is functionally complete and all 16 FR-03 tests pass. The upload route correctly handles .cer/.pem/.crt files, parses expiry dates, extracts certificate chains, and creates monitored entries. However, there's a critical type safety issue at line 56 where certificate.filename (str | None) is passed to Path() which doesn't accept None. This will cause a runtime TypeError crash when filename is missing. Fix the None check and the implementation is complete.
